info.name: Unity Sentis (ONNX + C# DSP bundle)
info.description: Drop-in deployment for any Unity Sentis project (Quest 2/3, mobile XR, desktop). Converts the trained TFLite to ONNX, bundles the matching C# DSP extractors (Spectral Analysis, MFE, MFCC) selected automatically based on the impulse's DSP blocks, and ships a metadata.json describing classes, sensor, and DSP parameters so the client-side preprocessing matches what the model was trained on.

parameters.name: Include EON-compiled model
parameters.help: Include the EON-compiled .h files alongside the ONNX. Optional; the Quest app uses the ONNX, but the EON output can be useful for native plugins.

parameters.name: Quantization
parameters.help: Which TFLite variant to convert. float32 matches Sentis's default precision.
